ddls:
CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial instrument */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the instrument */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the instrument */,
  "market_sector" TEXT /* Market sector the instrument belongs to (e.g., Technology, Energy) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the instrument */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the instrument is traded */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the instrument is listed */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number (ISIN) of the instrument */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the instrument's metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instruments_market_sector FOREIGN KEY ("market_sector") REFERENCES market_sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial instrument */,
  "time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data entry */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the instrument */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the instrument during the period */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the instrument during the period */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the instrument */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the instrument */,
  "median_price" REAL /* Median price of the instrument */,
  "rsi" REAL /* Relative Strength Index (RSI) of the instrument */,
  "fast_sma" REAL /* Fast Simple Moving Average (SMA) of the instrument */,
  "slow_sma" REAL /* Slow Simple Moving Average (SMA) of the instrument */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the market data (e.g., API, exchange) */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset to track changes over time */,
  "adjusted_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price to account for corporate actions */,
  "volume_weighted_price" REAL /* Volume-weighted average price (VWAP) of the instrument */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the market sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the market sector */,
  "parent_sector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to a parent sector to support hierarchical sector categorization */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the sector's metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number for additional contact information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client used to access the data */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique session identifier for the user session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_rules" (
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert rule */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial instrument */,
  "rule_name" TEXT /* Name of the alert rule */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition for the alert (e.g., price, RSI) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price change, technical indicator) */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which the alert should be checked (e.g., daily, hourly) */,
  "last_triggered" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last time the alert was triggered */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating whether the alert rule is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_rules_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert event */,
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alert rule */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market data that triggered the alert */,
  "trigger_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the alert was triggered */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message associated with the alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the alert */,
  "read" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating whether the alert has been read */,
  "dismissed" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating whether the alert has been dismissed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_rule_id FOREIGN KEY ("rule_id") REFERENCES alert_rules ("rule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., daily, weekly, custom) */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., generated, in progress, failed) */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the report file in bytes */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the report file (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_details" (
  "detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report detail */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market data */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "data_point" TEXT /* Data point included in the report (e.g., open_price, close_price) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the data point */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data used in the report (e.g., real-time, historical) */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset used in the report */,
  "data_period" TEXT /* Period of the data used in the report (e.g., 1-day, 1-week) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_details_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_details_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_details_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "pref_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "pref_name" TEXT /* Name of the preference (e.g., dashboard_layout, alert_frequency) */,
  "pref_value" TEXT /* Value of the preference */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user preferences */,
  "theme" TEXT /* User's preferred theme (e.g., light, dark) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pref_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions assigned to the role (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the role's metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
